name: Doce Mundo Confectionery
description: Portfolio with image gallery built for Doce Mundo confectionery, showcasing products and associated brands. Clean, responsive interface built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

name: CineFlix
description: Modern streaming platform for movies and series, developed as a personal project. Integrates APIs for film information (IMDB), streaming technology, and a fluid interface. Stack: Vite, React, TypeScript, and other modern tools.

name: Software Engineer Portfolio
description: Personal presentation site with about, projects, experiences, and contact sections. Responsive design with fluid animations (GSAP), light/dark theme support, and internationalization (pt-BR/en).
